div1.entryFree: Cistern, a receptacle of water: like ivory conduits coral --s filling, Lucr. 1234. or keep it as a c. for foul toads to knot and gender in, Oth. IV, 2, 62. so half my Egypt were submerged and made a c. for scaled snakes, Ant. II, 5, 95. Tropically: your wives, your daughters, your matrons and your maids, could not fill up the c. of my lust, Mcb. IV, 3, 63.
